creator: midom@dammit.lt
text:
This utility is neat RFC 1878 subnet calculator / helper that can be used
by not experienced or lazy sysops ;-)

Fix: 

uudecode, unzip, untar, commit ;-)
How-To-Repeat: begin 644 cidr.tar.gz
